steps.title: Identify the rate
steps.content: In the equation $l=25+3w$, the coefficient of $w$ is $3$. This means the spring length changes by $3$ centimeters for each $1$-newton change in weight.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: The coefficient describes the increase in length, in centimeters, for each one-newton increase in weight. The answer is D.
